description: ITRAT Introduce Girls Knee High Bow Socks 6 Pairs Add a touch of classic elegance to your little one's school uniform with these charming knee-high socks. Each pair features a beautifully crafted satin bow at the back, creating a sophisticated and polished look perfect for everyday wear. The black colour maintains a smart appearance while complementing various school uniforms. These socks are designed with comfort in mind, offering a smooth fit that stays in place throughout the day. The knee-high length provides warmth and style, making them ideal for both regular school days and special occasions. The decorative satin bows add a delightful feminine touch without compromising on practicality. These versatile socks are suitable for school uniforms, party wear, or any occasion requiring a refined appearance. The durable construction ensures they maintain their shape and appearance through regular wear and washing, making them a practical choice for daily use.
